purpose: Frozen evaluation slice locked on 2026-06-12 before accepting any protected-baseline pin update. Cases were chosen to be family-balanced AND deliberately exclude cases worked on during the v0.1-alpha-public sprint (007, 023, 030, 033, 034, 036, 037, 049), so this slice was not seen by the code that targets it.
fingerprint_method: sha256 over JSON-canonicalised dict {case_id: full_case_object}, case_ids sorted, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')
do_not_modify: This file defines the v0.1-alpha-public locked heldout slice. Changing case_ids or content_fingerprint_sha256 invalidates every heldout-based decision recorded in reports/baseline_pin_*.md. If a case needs to be replaced, lock a new split (heldout_v0_2) rather than mutating this one.
